sections.content:
Measures of Central Tendency

These describe the 'middle' or 'typical' value in a data set:

Mean: Add all values and divide by the number of values.
Example: 4, 7, 3, 9, 2 → Mean = (4+7+3+9+2) ÷ 5 = 25 ÷ 5 = 5

Median: The middle value when data is ordered from smallest to largest. If there are two middle values, find the mean of those two.
Example: 2, 3, 4, 7, 9 → Median = 4

Mode: The value that appears most often. Data can have one mode, more than one mode, or no mode.
Example: 2, 3, 3, 5, 7, 7, 7 → Mode = 7

🔑 Range and Spread:
• Range = maximum value − minimum value
• Interquartile Range (IQR) = Upper Quartile (Q3) − Lower Quartile (Q1)
The IQR is more robust than range as it ignores extreme values (outliers).

Data Display

Stem-and-leaf plot: Shows the actual data values in order. The 'stem' is the leading digit(s), the 'leaves' are the final digits. Good for small data sets.

Box-and-whisker plot (box plot): Shows 5-number summary — minimum, Q1, median, Q3, maximum. The box spans Q1 to Q3; the whiskers extend to min and max.

Dot plots and frequency tables: Useful for small discrete data sets. Frequency tables show how many times each value occurs.

When choosing a graph type:
• Bar graph: comparing categories
• Line graph: changes over time
• Pie chart: parts of a whole
• Histogram: grouped continuous data

Sampling and Bias

A population is the entire group being studied. A sample is a subset of the population.

A random sample gives every member an equal chance of being selected and reduces bias. Common sources of bias include convenience sampling (only asking people nearby) and voluntary response (only motivated people respond).

The larger the sample size (and the more representative it is), the more reliable the statistics will be.

questions.question: Find the median of: 3, 7, 2, 9, 5, 1, 8
questions.explanation: Ordered: 1, 2, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9. The middle value (4th of 7) is 5.

questions.question: In the data set 2, 4, 4, 5, 7, 7, 7, 9, what is the mode?
questions.explanation: The mode is the most frequently occurring value. 7 appears 3 times, more than any other value.

questions.question: A data set has Q1 = 12 and Q3 = 27. What is the Interquartile Range (IQR)?
